text: Moving from the dim, impersonal corridors into this vibrant, intellectually charged exhibit space, I sense a dramatic shift. The isolation of the hallway evaporates. Here, surrounded by innovations and the language of research and development, I feel a surge of curiosity and possibility. I am invigorated, my mind alive with speculation about the relationship between humanity and its creations, delighted by the thought that my own reflections might one day shape a wall like this.
